/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -std=c++11 -pthread -g -g --coverage -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_client_dummy.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_client_dummy.dir/test_client_dummy.cpp.o -o test_client_dummy  -lgcov /usr/lib/libboost_unit_test_framework.so.1.88.0 ../../src/shared/libshared_static.a ../../src/client/libclient_static.a ../../src/shared/libshared_static.a -lgcov /usr/lib/libsfml-graphics.so.2.6.2 /usr/lib/libsfml-network.so.2.6.2 /usr/lib/libsfml-window.so.2.6.2 /usr/lib/libsfml-system.so.2.6.2
